# pheno-config

> Canonical typed-config loader for the pheno-* fleet. Reads
> `<PREFIX>_*` env vars, JSON files, or TOML files, returning a
> single `Config { url, port, log_level, db_path, feature_flags }`.
> The 12-factor `combine()` overlays env over TOML, with the file as
> source of truth for required fields and env as the runtime override.

## Public API

```rust
use pheno_config::{Config, ConfigBuilder, ConfigError, Result, combine};

pub struct Config {
    pub url: String,
    pub port: u16,
    pub log_level: String,
    pub db_path: String,
    pub feature_flags: Vec<String>,
}

pub enum ConfigError {
    MissingField(String),
    ParseError { field: String, message: String },
    IoError(#[from] std::io::Error),
}

pub fn load_from_env(prefix: &str) -> Result<Config>;
pub fn load_from_file(path: &Path) -> Result<Config>;
pub fn load_from_toml_file(path: &Path) -> Result<Config>;
pub fn combine(file: &Path, env_prefix: &str) -> Result<Config>;
```

## Quickstart

```toml
# Cargo.toml
[dependencies]
pheno-config = "0.2"
```

```rust
use pheno_config::{combine, ConfigBuilder};

// 12-factor path: file + env overlay.
let cfg = combine("config.toml", "PHENO_CONFIG")?;
// Programmatic path: builder with sensible defaults.
let cfg = ConfigBuilder::new().url("https://x").db_path("/d").build()?;
```

## Conventions

- Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`).
- rustfmt + clippy (`-D warnings`); `#![warn(missing_docs)]` on the
  public API.
- 80% lib coverage gate (ADR-040); see `llvm-cov.toml` and the
  `coverage` job in `.github/workflows/ci.yml`.
- 3-variant `ConfigError` is a closed `enum` (no `#[non_exhaustive]`)
  so consumer `match` exhaustiveness checks are useful.
- `thiserror` for error derives; no `anyhow` boundary.
- TOML/JSON/env parsing; `combine()` is the canonical 12-factor path
  (file-then-env, env wins per scalar, feature_flags concatenate
  deduplicated).
- Standalone crate (empty `[workspace]` table in `Cargo.toml`); not
  a member of the root monorepo workspace.

## See also

- `docs/twelve-factor.md` — 12-factor contract deep-dive.
- `README.md` — API surface, env-var names, error type, versioning.
- `AGENTS.md` — agent context.
- `WORKLOG.md` — change history (v2.1 schema).
- `CHANGELOG.md` — release notes.
- `LICENSE-MIT` / `LICENSE-APACHE` — dual license.
- Sibling: `pheno-flags` (env-driven feature flags), `pheno-errors`
  (canonical `AppError`), `pheno-context` (request context).
